plan_adherence_notes: Steps 1-3 were implemented: backend GET/POST /v1/markets/{id}/comments with validation, idempotency, active-market gating, and protected-write coverage; frontend API types/client/hooks; and a DiscussionThread on MarketDetail. Step 4 was not completed. I found no dedicated backend /comments route coverage in tests/test_bayes_market_api.py and no frontend assertions for DiscussionThread or comment posting in frontend/src/__tests__/MarketDetail.test.tsx or frontend/src/__tests__/api-client.test.ts. Existing frontend tests pass, but MarketDetail emits React Query warnings because getMarketComments is not mocked.
missed_questions: If comments are paginated with fromSeq/limit, what should the market-detail UI do once a thread exceeds the first page: load more, infinite scroll, or intentionally cap the visible thread?
reason: The implementation mostly matches the researched plan, but the planned verification work was skipped. Comment routes and discussion-thread behavior were added without dedicated backend/frontend regression coverage, and the current MarketDetail tests emit query warnings instead of validating the new comments query.
